_comment: Direct-support donation links for the maintainer (NOT the Sponsor-A-Can 501c3, NOT tax-deductible). Read by BOTH the web donate page (fetch /data/donate/methods.json, merged + de-duped by network into the source grid) AND native donate.rs (load_donate_methods -> build_donation_sources). Add a method = add an object here; no code change (infinite-of-X). Crypto addresses are handled separately (they need balance display), not listed here.

methods.label: Recurring or one-time sponsorship via GitHub.
